message:
feat(abi): add process/mmap/poll ABI modules, expand stdio to full POSIX surface, wire pthread sync ops

Three new ABI modules implement POSIX function families with membrane gating:

- mmap_abi.rs (5 entrypoints): mmap, munmap, mprotect, msync, madvise under
  ApiFamily::VirtualMemory. Hardened mode sanitizes invalid prot flags to
  PROT_READ, missing MAP_SHARED/MAP_PRIVATE to MAP_PRIVATE, conflicting
  MS_ASYNC|MS_SYNC to MS_ASYNC, and unknown madvise to MADV_NORMAL.

- poll_abi.rs (4 entrypoints): poll, ppoll, select, pselect under
  ApiFamily::Poll. Hardened mode clamps oversized nfds (>1M for poll,
  >FD_SETSIZE for select). pselect6 correctly packs the sigset+size
  struct expected by the Linux syscall ABI.

- process_abi.rs (6 entrypoints): fork (via SYS_clone+SIGCHLD), _exit
  (via SYS_exit_group, diverging), execve, execvp (libc PATH search),
  waitpid (via SYS_wait4), wait. Hardened mode clamps exit status to
  [0,255] and sanitizes unrecognized wait option bits.

stdio_abi.rs is rewritten from a 4-function bootstrap to the full POSIX
stdio surface (27 entrypoints):

- Global stream registry mapping opaque FILE* sentinel addresses to
  StdioStream instances; stdin/stdout/stderr pre-registered at startup.
- File lifecycle: fopen (SYS_openat), fclose (flush + SYS_close).
- Buffered I/O: fread, fwrite, fgetc, fputc, fgets, fputs with internal
  read/write buffer management and on-demand fd refill.
- Seeking: fseek (SYS_lseek), ftell, rewind (seek+clearerr).
- Status: feof, ferror, clearerr, ungetc, fileno.
- Buffering control: setvbuf, setbuf (delegates to internal BufMode).
- printf family: printf, fprintf, sprintf, snprintf using c_variadic
  (#![feature(c_variadic)] enabled). Variadic arguments extracted via
  macro-based va_list walking guided by parsed format specs. Full
  render_printf engine handles %d/%i/%u/%x/%X/%o/%f/%e/%g/%a/%c/%s/%p/%n
  with width, precision, length modifiers, and flag combinations.
- perror: errno-to-message table covering 22 common POSIX error codes.
- Preserved bootstrap functions: putchar, puts, getchar (unchanged logic,
  redundant SAFETY comments cleaned up).

pthread_abi.rs extended with 15 synchronization entrypoints:
- Mutex: init, destroy, lock, trylock, unlock. Hardened destroy handles
  EBUSY by force-unlocking then retrying. Hardened unlock silently absorbs
  EPERM (not-owner) instead of propagating the error.
- Condition variables: init, destroy, wait, signal, broadcast.
- Reader-writer locks: init, destroy, rdlock, wrlock, unlock.
All ops null-check their primary argument and return EINVAL early.

Existing ABI refinements:
- inet_abi.rs: replaced magic numbers 2/10 with AF_INET/AF_INET6 constants
  imported from glibc_rs_core::socket.
- socket_abi.rs: moved trailing comment into block comment above the
  hardened-mode address family check.
- termios_abi.rs: removed incorrect errno override on tcgetattr/tcsetattr
  failure — libc already sets the correct errno (EBADF, ENOTTY, EINTR).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
